# technitium_dns_settings (Resource)

Manages the Technitium DNS Server settings. This is a singleton resource — only one instance should exist.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "technitium_dns_settings" "this" {
  dns_server_domain   = "dns.example.com"
  default_record_ttl  = 3600
  dnssec_validation   = true
  recursion           = "AllowOnlyForPrivateNetworks"
  enable_blocking     = true
  forwarders          = ["1.1.1.1", "8.8.8.8"]
  forwarder_protocol  = "Udp"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier for the settings (always `settings`).

### Optional

#### General

- `dns_server_domain` (String) The primary domain name used by this DNS Server to identify itself.
- `dns_server_local_end_points` (List of String) Local end points (IP:port) the DNS Server listens on.
- `dns_server_ipv4_source_addresses` (List of String) IPv4 source addresses for outbound DNS requests.
- `dns_server_ipv6_source_addresses` (List of String) IPv6 source addresses for outbound DNS requests.
- `default_record_ttl` (Number) The default TTL value for records.
- `default_ns_record_ttl` (Number) The default TTL value for NS records.
- `default_soa_record_ttl` (Number) The default TTL value for SOA records.
- `default_responsible_person` (String) The default SOA Responsible Person email address.
- `use_soa_serial_date_scheme` (Boolean) Use date scheme for SOA serial.
- `min_soa_refresh` (Number) Minimum SOA Refresh interval in seconds.
- `min_soa_retry` (Number) Minimum SOA Retry interval in seconds.
- `zone_transfer_allowed_networks` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to perform zone transfer.
- `notify_allowed_networks` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to send notify for secondary zones.
- `dns_apps_enable_automatic_update` (Boolean) Allow DNS server to automatically update DNS Apps.

#### Network

- `prefer_ipv6` (Boolean) Use IPv6 for querying whenever possible.
- `enable_udp_socket_pool` (Boolean) Enable UDP socket pool for outbound requests.
- `udp_payload_size` (Number) Maximum EDNS UDP payload size (512-4096).

#### DNSSEC

- `dnssec_validation` (Boolean) Enable DNSSEC validation.
- `edns_client_subnet` (Boolean) Enable EDNS Client Subnet.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv4_prefix_length` (Number) EDNS Client Subnet IPv4 prefix length.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv6_prefix_length` (Number) EDNS Client Subnet IPv6 prefix length.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv4_override` (String) IPv4 network address override for ECS.
- `edns_client_subnet_ipv6_override` (String) IPv6 network address override for ECS.

#### QPM Limits

- `qpm_limit_sample_minutes` (Number) Client query stats sample size in minutes for QPM limit.
- `qpm_limit_udp_truncation_percentage` (Number) Percentage of requests responded with TC when QPM limit exceeds (0-100).
- `qpm_limit_bypass_list` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to bypass QPM limit.

#### Timeouts

- `client_timeout` (Number) Timeout in milliseconds before responding ServerFailure (1000-10000).
- `tcp_send_timeout` (Number) Max TCP send timeout in milliseconds (1000-90000).
- `tcp_receive_timeout` (Number) Max TCP receive timeout in milliseconds (1000-90000).
- `quic_idle_timeout` (Number) QUIC idle connection timeout in milliseconds (1000-90000).
- `quic_max_inbound_streams` (Number) Max inbound bidirectional streams per QUIC connection (1-1000).
- `listen_backlog` (Number) Maximum pending inbound connections.
- `max_concurrent_resolutions_per_core` (Number) Max concurrent async outbound resolutions per CPU core.

#### Web Service

- `web_service_local_addresses` (List of String) Network interface IP addresses the web service listens on.
- `web_service_http_port` (Number) TCP port for the web console HTTP.
- `web_service_enable_tls` (Boolean) Enable HTTPS for the web service.
- `web_service_enable_http3` (Boolean) Enable HTTP/3 for the web service.
- `web_service_http_to_tls_redirect` (Boolean) Enable HTTP to HTTPS redirection.
- `web_service_use_self_signed_tls_certificate` (Boolean) Use self-signed TLS certificate.
- `web_service_tls_port` (Number) TCP port for the web console HTTPS.
- `web_service_tls_certificate_path` (String) Path to PKCS #12 certificate (.pfx) for web HTTPS.
- `web_service_tls_certificate_password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the web service TLS certificate.
- `web_service_real_ip_header` (String) HTTP header for reading client IP behind a reverse proxy.

#### DNS-over-X Protocols

- `enable_dns_over_udp_proxy` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-UDP-PROXY requests.
- `enable_dns_over_tcp_proxy` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-TCP-PROXY requests.
- `enable_dns_over_http` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-HTTP requests.
- `enable_dns_over_tls` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-TLS requests.
- `enable_dns_over_https` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-HTTPS requests.
- `enable_dns_over_http3` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-HTTP/3 requests.
- `enable_dns_over_quic` (Boolean) Accept DNS-over-QUIC requests.
- `dns_over_udp_proxy_port` (Number) UDP port for DNS-over-UDP-PROXY.
- `dns_over_tcp_proxy_port` (Number) TCP port for DNS-over-TCP-PROXY.
- `dns_over_http_port` (Number) TCP port for DNS-over-HTTP.
- `dns_over_tls_port` (Number) TCP port for DNS-over-TLS.
- `dns_over_https_port` (Number) TCP port for DNS-over-HTTPS.
- `dns_over_quic_port` (Number) UDP port for DNS-over-QUIC.

#### Reverse Proxy & TLS for DNS

- `reverse_proxy_network_acl` (List of String) ACL for reverse proxy access for DNS-over-UDP-PROXY, DNS-over-TCP-PROXY, and DNS-over-HTTP protocols.
- `dns_tls_certificate_path` (String) Path to PKCS #12 certificate (.pfx) for DNS-over-TLS/HTTPS.
- `dns_tls_certificate_password` (String, Sensitive) Password for the DNS TLS certificate.
- `dns_over_http_real_ip_header` (String) HTTP header for reading client IP for DNS-over-HTTP behind a reverse proxy.

#### Recursion

- `recursion` (String) Recursion policy. Valid values: `Deny`, `Allow`, `AllowOnlyForPrivateNetworks`, `UseSpecifiedNetworkACL`.
- `recursion_network_acl` (List of String) Access Control List for recursion (used when recursion is `UseSpecifiedNetworkACL`).
- `randomize_name` (Boolean) Enable QNAME randomization (0x20).
- `qname_minimization` (Boolean) Enable QNAME minimization.
- `resolver_retries` (Number) Number of retries for the recursive resolver.
- `resolver_timeout` (Number) Timeout in milliseconds for the recursive resolver.
- `resolver_concurrency` (Number) Number of concurrent requests for the recursive resolver.
- `resolver_max_stack_count` (Number) Max stack count for the recursive resolver.

#### Cache

- `save_cache` (Boolean) Save DNS cache on disk when the server stops.
- `serve_stale` (Boolean) Enable serve stale feature.
- `serve_stale_ttl` (Number) TTL in seconds for expired cached records (max 7 days).
- `serve_stale_answer_ttl` (Number) TTL in seconds for stale response records (0-300).
- `serve_stale_reset_ttl` (Number) TTL in seconds to reset stale record TTL (10-900).
- `serve_stale_max_wait_time` (Number) Max wait time in milliseconds before serving stale (0-1800).
- `cache_maximum_entries` (Number) Maximum entries in cache.
- `cache_minimum_record_ttl` (Number) Minimum TTL for cached records.
- `cache_maximum_record_ttl` (Number) Maximum TTL for cached records.
- `cache_negative_record_ttl` (Number) Negative TTL for cached records.
- `cache_failure_record_ttl` (Number) Failure TTL for cached records.
- `cache_prefetch_eligibility` (Number) Minimum initial TTL for prefetch eligibility.
- `cache_prefetch_trigger` (Number) TTL trigger value to initiate prefetch. Set 0 to disable.
- `cache_prefetch_sample_interval_in_minutes` (Number) Sample interval in minutes for auto prefetch.
- `cache_prefetch_sample_eligibility_hits_per_hour` (Number) Minimum hits per hour for auto prefetch eligibility.

#### Blocking

- `enable_blocking` (Boolean) Enable domain name blocking.
- `allow_txt_blocking_report` (Boolean) Respond with TXT records containing blocked domain report.
- `blocking_bypass_list` (List of String) IP/network addresses allowed to bypass blocking.
- `blocking_type` (String) Blocking response type. Valid values: `AnyAddress`, `NxDomain`, `CustomAddress`.
- `blocking_answer_ttl` (Number) TTL in seconds for blocking responses.
- `custom_blocking_addresses` (List of String) Custom blocking IP addresses (used when blocking_type is `CustomAddress`).
- `block_list_urls` (List of String) Block list URLs for automatic download.
- `block_list_update_interval_hours` (Number) Interval in hours for block list auto-update.

#### Proxy

- `proxy_type` (String) Proxy protocol type. Valid values: `None`, `Http`, `Socks5`.
- `proxy_address` (String) Proxy server hostname or IP.
- `proxy_port` (Number) Proxy server port.
- `proxy_username` (String) Proxy server username.
- `proxy_password` (String, Sensitive) Proxy server password.
- `proxy_bypass` (String) Comma separated bypass list for proxy.

#### Forwarders

- `forwarders` (List of String) List of forwarder addresses. Set empty to do recursive resolution.
- `forwarder_protocol` (String) Forwarder DNS transport protocol. Valid values: `Udp`, `Tcp`, `Tls`, `Https`, `Quic`.
- `concurrent_forwarding` (Boolean) Query multiple forwarders concurrently.
- `forwarder_retries` (Number) Number of retries for forwarder DNS client.
- `forwarder_timeout` (Number) Timeout in milliseconds for forwarder DNS client.
- `forwarder_concurrency` (Number) Number of concurrent requests for forwarder DNS client.

#### Logging

- `logging_type` (String) Logging type. Valid values: `None`, `File`, `Console`, `FileAndConsole`.
- `ignore_resolver_logs` (Boolean) Stop logging domain name resolution errors.
- `log_queries` (Boolean) Log every query and response.
- `use_local_time` (Boolean) Use local time instead of UTC for logging.
- `log_folder` (String) Folder path for log files.
- `max_log_file_days` (Number) Max days to keep log files. Set 0 to disable auto delete.
- `enable_in_memory_stats` (Boolean) Enable in-memory stats (only Last Hour on Dashboard).
- `max_stat_file_days` (Number) Max days to keep stat files. Set 0 to disable auto delete.

## Import

DNS settings can be imported using the literal string `settings`:

```shell
terraform import technitium_dns_settings.this settings
```
